highlights: The field of agentic AI is advancing significantly, with new research focusing on foundational architectures for distributed agent networks, sophisticated benchmarks for evaluating complex decision-making, and real-world applications demonstrating autonomy in scientific discovery.

Major AI companies are prioritizing practical deployment and safety, evidenced by new model capabilities, methods for pre-release behavior simulation, and strategic initiatives to accelerate enterprise AI adoption and secure long-running agentic workflows.

The AI development ecosystem is expanding with critical new benchmarks for specialized domains like clinical speech and life sciences, alongside educational resources aimed at equipping developers and the workforce with essential AI building skills.

agents.title: Distributed General-Purpose Agent Networks: Architecture, Key Mechanisms, and Prototypes
agents.summary: This paper proposes a layered architecture for distributed general-purpose agent networks, outlining core mechanisms for semantic announcement, verifiable identity, and open task execution. It provides a system-level foundation for scalable, trustworthy agent collaboration across heterogeneous environments.

agents.title: Can LLMs Be CEOs? Benchmarking Strategic Resource Reallocation with Multi-Role Agent Simulation
agents.summary: CEO-Bench is a new multi-agent benchmark evaluating LLMs on CEO-level strategic resource reallocation, simulating conflicting advice from C-suite advisors. It uncovers systematic failure modes and capability boundaries, guiding the design of future AI-assisted executive systems.

agents.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
agents.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one demonstrated a near-autonomous AI chemist, powered by GPT-5.4, that successfully optimized a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry, showcasing AI's potential to accelerate scientific discovery.

models.title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
models.summary: Google showcased nine new demos highlighting the advanced capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, reinforcing their role in driving innovation across various AI applications.

models.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
models.summary: JetBrains introduced Mellum2, a 12B Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, designed to offer high-performance and efficiency for a range of AI applications, expanding options for developers.

models.title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
models.summary: NVIDIA's Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety offers customizable multimodal safety features for global enterprise AI, addressing crucial needs for responsible and secure AI deployment.

tools.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
tools.summary: OpenAI launched LifeSciBench, an expert-authored and reviewed benchmark designed to evaluate AI systems on real-world life science research tasks, providing a standardized framework for progress in the domain.

tools.title: SpeechDx: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Clinical Speech AI
tools.summary: SpeechDx is a large-scale, multi-task benchmark for clinical speech AI, featuring 12 datasets and 27 tasks across diverse health conditions, offering a unified framework to track progress in general-purpose clinical speech representations.

tools.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
tools.summary: OpenAI introduced Deployment Simulation, a novel method utilizing real conversation data to predict AI model behavior before release, significantly enhancing safety and evaluation accuracy for developers.

companies.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
companies.summary: OpenAI launched its Partner Network with a $150M investment to empower global partners in accelerating enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation, signaling a major push into the enterprise market.

companies.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
companies.summary: OpenAI announced its intent to acquire Ona to expand Codex capabilities with secure, persistent cloud environments, aiming to enable long-running AI agents across complex enterprise workflows.

companies.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
companies.summary: Google AI's AMIE, a conversational AI system, demonstrated performance comparable to primary care physicians in managing complex health conditions, as published in Nature, highlighting significant advancements in medical AI.

learning.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
learning.summary: OpenAI introduced three new Academy courses designed to equip individuals with practical AI skills, enabling them to create repeatable workflows and effectively apply AI agents in their daily work.

learning.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
learning.summary: This technical guide on the Hugging Face Blog delves into advanced PyTorch profiling, specifically optimizing `nn.Linear` to a fused MLP, offering builders insights into improving model efficiency and performance.

learning.title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
learning.summary: University of Waterloo students, collaborating with Google's Futures Lab, are developing real-life AI prototypes like sign language tutors, showcasing how academic programs are reshaping future education and work with AI.
